lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Oh great, another customer. What do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing out here?

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: I used to work in the East Varrock branch. Then a request came in to set up a bank in this new town.

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: The other clerks and myself pulled straws and I was unlucky enough to be sent to this stinking death trap.

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Now I'm stuck here, ferrying items back and forth to the bank's safe in Varrock for people like you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That doesn't sound very fun, but you're doing a great service for us adventurers.

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Tell that to my back and legs, I'm exhausted from carrying all this junk back and forth.

sections.title: Using un-noted items on the Banker

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Hand me a banknote, and I'll try to convert it to an item.

sections.title: Using platinum tokens on the Banker
